subject: [PATCH v5 01/21] mm/swap: decouple swap cache from physical swap infrastructure

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch decouples the swap cache from physical swap infrastructure, preparing for virtualization of swap space. It removes swap cache related helpers from the swap table and moves to a single global lock for synchronization. The swap cache will be re-partitioned into virtual swap clusters once it is moved to the virtual swap layer. This change is temporary and will be repurposed later as an rmap (physical -> virtual swap mapping).
